name: MD. SAZIB
title: Cybersecurity Enthusiast
subtitle: Red Team Specialist | Ethical Hacker
bio: I'm a 4th-year Computer Science & Engineering student with an unwavering passion for offensive security and Red Teaming. My journey began with curiosity about how systems break, evolving into a dedicated pursuit of mastering the art of ethical hacking. I specialize in penetration testing, vulnerability assessment, and security research. When I'm not hunting bugs, you'll find me contributing to security communities and exploring the latest attack vectors.
